case_title: MARK LINARES VS. JOEY DEWAYNE ENGLISH

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-09-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-16-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF MARK LINARES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOEY ENGLISH IS PRESENT. PARTIES HAVE REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE NEXT HEARING, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,207.00 FILED BY LINARES, MARK AS TO DEFENDANT ENGLISH, JOEY DEWAYNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-09-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY LINARES, MARK ENGLISH, JOEY DEWAYNE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED APR-16-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ENGLISH, JOEY DEWAYNE
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 2/16/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOEY ENGLISH IS PRESENT. PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT BETWEEN PARTIES, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
